description: Applying cumulative Windows security patch KB5034441 to all Windbridge workstations during off-hours maintenance window. Patch addresses 3 high-severity CVEs. Rollback plan: restore from pre-patch snapshot via endpoint management console. Testing completed on 2 pilot machines.

short_description: SAS 9.4 minor version upgrade on research cluster
description: Upgrading SAS 9.4 to SAS 9.4 TS1M8 on the shared research cluster to resolve the license renewal and R interoperability issues. Upgrade tested in staging environment. All existing SAS jobs confirmed compatible. Scheduled for Saturday 02:00–06:00 maintenance window.

Replacing access point wb-ap-3f-01 on the 3rd floor of 200 Technology Square with a higher-capacity Cisco Catalyst 9115 to resolve ongoing Wi-Fi congestion causing Zoom drops. New AP to be provisioned and tested before cutover during lunch break on 2026-01-01.

short_description: File server migration — wb-nas01 to wb-nas02
description: Migrating Windbridge internal file shares from \\wb-nas01 to new NetApp NAS appliance wb-nas02. Includes updating all GPO drive mapping scripts. Estimated downtime: 4 hours. Data migration will occur over the prior weekend; Monday switchover will redirect drive letters to new server.

short_description: Okta MFA push notification config fix — iOS
description: Updating Okta SCIM provisioning configuration to fix MFA push notification delivery on iOS devices following Okta app v8.2.0 update. Change involves toggling push notification delivery settings in Okta admin console and reissuing device push tokens for affected accounts.

short_description: R package update — survival and Matrix on research cluster
description: Installing updated R packages (survival 3.5.8, Matrix 1.6-0) on the research cluster to resolve the dependency conflict affecting the mRNA-4157 trial analysis scripts. Packages tested in isolated conda environment. R session restart required; no cluster downtime anticipated.
